title: House Committee on Science Space & Tech
text:
Lucas and Obernolte Seek Answers to Concerning DOE FOA Changes: “Encouraging unionization is an inappropriate attempt to insert politics into science.”
Lucas Congratulates Garcia and Collins for Being Named NDAA Conferees
Williams and Obernolte Question Granholm on Stock Holdings at DOE
Lucas and Lofgren Tell Commerce IG to Stop Withholding Documents
Babin Statement in Opposition to H.R. 1338, the Satellite Telecommunications Streamlining Act
